title: MobLimiter
description: This Plugin is very usefull for big Servers that are fighting against Players farms. Like XP Mob Farms or Villagers.
body:
**With MobLimiter you can Limit how far Players can go with spawning Mobs.
The Plugin is counting in a provided Chunk Range how many Mobs are existing.**
A Limit without Chunk range is also suported (Global Limit).

And if the count goes over the Limit, the Mobs will be **deleted**.
The Plugin will also stop Players breeding Mobs if this will go over limit.
And they will get a Notify that they reached the Limit.
